 # About this repository
 This repository is a simple react app rendering Redocly component that is importing an Open API yml specification. The yml files are in the public folder, the entry point is `public/open-api.yml`. The rest of the yml files are in the sub-folders `public/components`, `public/paths` and `public/webhooks`.

 # Instructions for updating the API documentation
 This is a repo that documents the API for the repo pingwire. The repo pingwire is a submodule to this repo, found under 'pingwire'.
 When asked to update documentation, look at the pingwire submodule to find information about how the API is working. The pingwire repository (the submodule) has a copilot instructions file which explains the folder structure.
